title: CORE - 211info
text: IMPACT NW DANCING TREE RESOURCE CENTER CORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A 3-month curriculum focused on assisting youth in developing job skills such as resume writing, creating employment opportunities through partnerships with local businesses, and college and career exploration. 10055 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Grades 9-12 Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 721-6751 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 721-6751 Alternate (503) 701-9868 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information AREA SERVED: Centennial, David Douglas, Franklin, Gresham, Madison, Parkrose, Reynolds, and Roosevelt High Schools and the Metropolitan Learning Center SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Limited parking; street parking encouraged. Accessible by MAX blue line and TriMet bus line 20. Services: Higher Education Awareness/Support Programs Youth Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING AND RENTAL ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RECOVERY SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WORKER OF THE DAY INFORMATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY RESOURCE DESK LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - COMMUNITIES FOR SAFE KIDS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - AKA SCIENCE UTILITIES - CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
